action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 1 achieved 69.89% accuracy with ConvNeXt Tiny in just 5 epochs. Training loss was still strongly decreasing (1.78) and train_acc was 0.69 vs noisy val_acc 0.54, indicating substantial underfitting to the clean underlying distribution. Analysis: With ~40% label noise, longer training + strong regularization/augmentation like MixUp should improve generalization to clean test labels. The model is far from converged. Decision: Add MixUp augmentation, cosine LR with linear warmup, and scale to 30 epochs to capitalize on the strong pretrained backbone. Keep AMP enabled for speed.
